# Břevnovský klášter – Event Venues Prague

> Historic venue hire for corporate events and weddings in Prague. From intimate meetings for 20 guests to congresses for 1,100. Free parking. Operated by IN CATERING.

Brevnov Monastery offers versatile historic event venues in Prague for a wide range of occasions. A unique blend of centuries-old atmosphere, modern services, premium catering by IN CATERING, and hassle-free parking makes it the ideal setting for your events in Prague.

## Website Sections

### Czech (CS)
- [Domovská stránka](https://brevnovevents.cz/) – Hlavní stránka s přehledem prostor a služeb.
- [Firemní eventy](https://brevnovevents.cz/firemni-eventy) – Prostory pro konference, gala večery, meetingy, vánoční večírky a firemní akce.
- [Svatba v klášteře](https://brevnovevents.cz/svatba-v-klastere) – Kompletní svatební servis na klíč, obřady i hostiny.
- [Ochrana osobních údajů (GDPR)](https://brevnovevents.cz/gdpr)

### English (EN)
- [Homepage](https://brevnovevents.cz/en) – Overview of event venues Prague and services.
- [Corporate Events](https://brevnovevents.cz/en/corporate-events) – Conference halls, gala dinners, meetings, Christmas parties, and corporate events in Prague.
- [Wedding Venue](https://brevnovevents.cz/en/wedding-venue) – Full-service wedding venue with ceremonies and receptions.
- [Privacy Policy](https://brevnovevents.cz/en/privacy-policy)

## Capacity & Services
- **Capacity:** 20 to 1,100 guests depending on the venue and layout.
- **Services:** Catering, furniture rental, programme coordination, AV support, free parking.
- **Experiences:** Monastery brewery tour, historic crypt visit, Maria Theresa dinner re-enactment, period markets, monk performances, baroque quartet concerts, and more.

## Keywords
prague venues, prague events, event venues Prague, events in prague, wedding venue Prague, corporate events Prague

For enquiries or detailed information, use the contact form on the website.
